commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a6d266b6c453f99c89853a2ca748abbd02271b97)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a gateway `update.run` post-core plugin-sync helper and tests that it calls plugin sync after successful non-git updates.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was run. Source inspection shows the CLI has documented post-core plugin sync while the gateway handler lacks an equivalent in-process sync path, but current managed global updates already hand off to the CLI path.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs contributor or maintainer repair plus after-fix real behavior proof; automation should not take over while the external proof gate is still unsatisfied.

target.title: fix(gateway): sync plugins after core update via update.run [AI-assisted]
target.body:
## Summary

- `update.run` (triggered by the WebUI update banner) called `runGatewayUpdate` to install the new core package, but never synced plugins afterward
- The CLI path (`openclaw update`) correctly calls `syncPluginsForUpdateChannel` + `updateNpmInstalledPlugins` after the core install — the gateway path was missing this step
- This caused plugin version drift on every WebUI-initiated update: core advanced, plugins stayed behind
- Added `runPostCorePluginSync` helper and wired it into `update.run` after a successful non-git install; plugin sync failure is non-fatal (gateway restart still proceeds)

## Real behavior proof

Reproduced on my own machine (macOS, OpenClaw v2026.5.12 gateway, Tailscale setup):

1. Used the WebUI update banner to update OpenClaw — core updated to v2026.5.12
2. `@openclaw/codex` plugin stayed at v2026.5.7 (pre-fix version)
3. v2026.5.7 placed SOUL.md in `config.instructions` instead of `developer_instructions`; the Codex model never received it, so the agent lost its persona on every `/new` session
4. Ran `openclaw plugins update codex` manually → plugin updated to v2026.5.12 → SOUL.md correctly injected into `developer_instructions` → persona restored

With this fix, `update.run` will call `syncPluginsForUpdateChannel` + `updateNpmInstalledPlugins` automatically after the core install, keeping plugins in sync without any manual intervention.

## Verification

```
pnpm test src/gateway/server-methods/update.test.ts
# 23 tests passed (16 existing + 7 new covering plugin sync behavior)

pnpm check:changed
# typecheck, lint, import cycles, boundary checks — all passed
```

## AI-assisted checklist

- [x] Marked as AI-assisted in the PR title
- [x] Human-run real behavior proof included above (reproduced and fixed on my own machine)
- [x] I understand what the code does
- [x] Did not edit CHANGELOG.md
target.author: shrimpapplepro
